'''鈭歬-j-ch''' ('''kakajach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quiet|quiet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quiet|quiet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-j-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kakajach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikajach|thikajach]] || [[word:jikajach|jikajach]] || [[word:shikajach|shikajach]] || [[word:kikajach|kikajach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukajach|thuthukajach]] || [[word:jujukajach|jujukajach]] || [[word:shushukajach|shushukajach]] || [[word:kukukajach|kukukajach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukajach|thukajach]] || [[word:jukajach|jukajach]] || [[word:shukajach|shukajach]] || [[word:kukajach|kukajach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukajach|thukajach]] || [[word:jukajach|jukajach]] || [[word:shukajach|shukajach]] || [[word:kukajach|kukajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekajach|thekajach]] || [[word:jekajach|jekajach]] || [[word:shekajach|shekajach]] || [[word:kekajach|kekajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokajach|thothokajach]] || [[word:jojokajach|jojokajach]] || [[word:shoshokajach|shoshokajach]] || [[word:kokokajach|kokokajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokajach|thokajach]] || [[word:jokajach|jokajach]] || [[word:shokajach|shokajach]] || [[word:kokajach|kokajach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokajach|thokajach]] || [[word:jokajach|jokajach]] || [[word:shokajach|shokajach]] || [[word:kokajach|kokajach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]] || [[word:kajach|kajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kajach|th忙kajach]] || [[word:j忙kajach|j忙kajach]] || [[word:sh忙kajach|sh忙kajach]] || [[word:k忙kajach|k忙kajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakajach|thathakajach]] || [[word:jajakajach|jajakajach]] || [[word:shashakajach|shashakajach]] || [[word:kakakajach|kakakajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakajach|thakajach]] || [[word:jakajach|jakajach]] || [[word:shakajach|shakajach]] || [[word:kakajach|kakajach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakajach|thakajach]] || [[word:jakajach|jakajach]] || [[word:shakajach|shakajach]] || [[word:kakajach|kakajach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakajach|shakajach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakajach|goshakajach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakajach|gokishakajach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakajachn眉|shakajachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakajachnkn眉|goshakajachnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajachn眉|gokishakajachn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakajachsh毛|shakajachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakajachnksh毛|goshakajachnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakajachsh毛|gokishakajachsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajachro|shakajachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajachnkro|goshakajachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajachro|gokishakajachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajachmu|shakajachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajachnkmu|goshakajachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajachmu|gokishakajachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakajachsher|shakajachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakajachnksher|goshakajachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakajachsher|gokishakajachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakajachng|shakajachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakajachnkng|goshakajachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakajachng|gokishakajachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakajachya|shakajachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakajachnkya|goshakajachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakajachya|gokishakajachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakajachyam|shakajachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakajachnkyam|goshakajachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakajachyam|gokishakajachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajachn眉sh毛|shakajachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajachnkn眉sh毛|goshakajachnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajachn眉sh毛|gokishakajachn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajachn眉ro|shakajachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajachnkn眉ro|goshakajachnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajachn眉ro|gokishakajachn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajachn眉mu|shakajachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajachnkn眉mu|goshakajachnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajachn眉mu|gokishakajachn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajachsh毛n眉|shakajachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajachnksh毛n眉|goshakajachnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajachsh毛n眉|gokishakajachsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajachsh毛ro|shakajachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajachnksh毛ro|goshakajachnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajachsh毛ro|gokishakajachsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajachsh毛mu|shakajachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajachnksh毛mu|goshakajachnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajachsh毛mu|gokishakajachsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajachron眉|shakajachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajachnkron眉|goshakajachnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajachron眉|gokishakajachron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajachrosh毛|shakajachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajachnkrosh毛|goshakajachnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajachrosh毛|gokishakajachrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajachromu|shakajachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajachnkromu|goshakajachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajachromu|gokishakajachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajachmun眉|shakajachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajachnkmun眉|goshakajachnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajachmun眉|gokishakajachmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajachmush毛|shakajachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajachnkmush毛|goshakajachnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajachmush毛|gokishakajachmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajachmuro|shakajachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajachnkmuro|goshakajachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajachmuro|gokishakajachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
